  1. uno.anahata.asi.swing.icons

Uses of Package
uno.anahata.asi.swing.icons

Packages that use uno.anahata.asi.swing.icons
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.nb.mine
Provides specialized "mining" utilities for extracting deep configuration and assets from the NetBeans IDE environment.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
Provides the core UI orchestration components for individual AGI sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.icons
The central hub for all programmatically drawn icons within the Anahata ASI Swing UI.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.swing.icons used by uno.anahata.asi.nb.mine
    Class
    Description
    IconProvider
    An interface for providing icons for various context-related objects.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.swing.icons used by uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
    Class
    Description
    IconProvider
    An interface for providing icons for various context-related objects.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.swing.icons used by uno.anahata.asi.swing.icons
    Class
    Description
    AbstractAnahataIcon
    The foundational base class for all programmatically drawn icons in the Anahata ASI ecosystem.
    DoubleToolIconRefined
    A refined programmatic Swing icon for tool containers (ToolsNode).
    LeafIcon.LeafState
    Stage of the leaf's lifecycle, mapped to context pruning states.
